captions.text: a 3-2-1 count-in, then read the line
★ pick the take used in preview + export
clean it with the post chain · drag to fix mic lag

lines.text: Need a voiceover? RECORD turns your script into a teleprompter.
Arm the mic, and record a take for the line you're on.
Read it as many times as you like.
Then switch to TUNE to hear your takes back to back,
and star the one you want to keep.
A small post-chain cleans up the sound, and if the mic lagged, drag the waveform back into sync.
